ip_outcome_note: Son Goku (Dragon Ball franchise) confirmed via the card's explicit title 'Bundle of Curiosity Son Goku' and Bandai character-tag. Internal Bandai IP — no external crossover risk. No IP callout block required.

trivia_bullets.text: Union Force (DBS-B02, November 3, 2017) is the second main booster in the Dragon Ball Super Card Game, 127-card set released approximately 3.5 months after Galactic Battle.
BT2-072 is a Green Battle card, 10,000 power, cost 2, 5,000 combo power, Saiyan special trait, Android Cell Saga era. Skill: 'When you play this card, draw 1 card' — a cantrip that replaces itself.
sources: WebSearch snippet via dbs-cardgame.com PDF example

trivia_bullets.text: The 'Bundle of Curiosity' card name reflects Bandai's alternate-costume novelty naming convention — Goku in an incongruous blue formal outfit with ruffled collar rather than combat gi. The deliberately low-power cantrip effect (draw 1) matches the comedic flavor of the art.

IP verified: Son Goku confirmed by card title and Bandai character-tag. The costume-comedy alternate art design is a recurring DBSCG minor-card design strand where known fighter characters appear in non-combat novelty contexts.
